items.title: Afroman Wins Defamation Trial As Ohio Jury Rejects Deputies’ $3.9 Million Lawsuit
items.dek: Afroman actually won!The Ohio deputies broke his gate down, found zero drugs, and then tried to sue him for millions after he put his own security camera footag
items.body: Afroman actually won!The Ohio deputies broke his gate down, found zero drugs, and then tried to sue him for millions after he put his own security camera footage of the raid into a music video. One of the deputies literally cried on the witness stand because the song made fun of her. The jury deliberated and gave the cops absolutely nothing. submitted by /u/ZealousidealCress389 [link] [comments]
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Ecuador gang leader wanted for murder of presidential candidate arrested
items.dek: Officials believe the man - known as Lobo Menor - is linked to the killing of Fernando Villavicencio in 2023.
items.body: Officials believe the man - known as Lobo Menor - is linked to the killing of Fernando Villavicencio in 2023.
